headline: What to Expect From Old Dominion Freight Line's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Old Dominion Freight Line is gearing up to report its first-quarter results soon, and analysts are expecting a double-digit decrease in earnings.

raw.headline: What to Expect From Old Dominion Freight Line's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
raw.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line is gearing up to report its first-quarter results soon, and analysts are expecting a double-digit decrease in earnings.

headline: 3 Transport-Service Stocks to Keep an Eye on Despite Industry Hiccups
summary: EXPD, ZTO and ULH are emerging as resilient players in the Zacks Transportation-Services industry, even as the freight downturn and high fuel costs continue to weigh on the industry.

raw.headline: 3 Transport-Service Stocks to Keep an Eye on Despite Industry Hiccups
raw.summary: EXPD, ZTO and ULH are emerging as resilient players in the Zacks Transportation-Services industry, even as the freight downturn and high fuel costs continue to weigh on the industry.
